headline.text: L1 ran *3 hours late* on Sollich 3 startup after Tunnel 2 allergen re-test, L3 Cute Cavanna down overnight and still fighting double-packs at window close.

per_plant_summary.L1: Sollich 3 delayed startup 3 hours clearing allergen re-test on Tunnel 2, then ran through multiple equipment pauses (metal detector belt, cooling, depositor nozzle) — all cleared inside shift. Sollich 4 mixer alarm resolved in 12 minutes. Sollich 2 prep blocked by enrober maintenance and Tunnel 2 visual fail; cases for tomorrow's Tate's run delayed until 13:00 tomorrow.
per_plant_summary.L2: FFS ran at 70 ppm with open-gusset and blade-cleaning pauses, all cleared same shift. ML2 pulled dirty molds mid-shift for staining and holes — team believes all molds need swap.
per_plant_summary.L3: ML1 C1/C2 conveyors faulting on tracking sensors, 60g molds found in 35g tote with no wash tracking, Cavanna open-product spike cleared by 14:50. ML4 TG4 HMI froze and cleared in 4 minutes. MF Matrix found foreign chocolate in supersack, now inspecting all inbound. Truffle Cute Cavanna down all of third shift, day lead fixed film setup, but double-packs restarted at 10:08 and still live at window close.

notes.text: Tate's Thursday start pushed to 11:00 from 07:00 due to 28-hour Level 4 clean (not 24). Running milk/white drizzle Thursday, dark Friday pending lab results.
THG tech (Cornell) conducted training on wrapper maintenance, sensor cleaning, and belt speed calibration for Sollich 4.
Truffle sweco has gouge/indent but no hole — flagged for review.

resolved.title: Tunnel 2 allergen re-test delayed startup 3 hours
resolved.summary: First allergen test failed at 21:06, re-washed belt and passed at 21:45, cleared to deposit.
resolved.resolution: Re-wash completed, allergen passed at 21:45 — 'The allergens passed' (Angelica Perez).

resolved.title: Soft chocolate from cooling tunnel temps out of range
resolved.summary: Product not cooling, chocolate soft, line stopped at 13:27 for chiller inspection.
resolved.resolution: Temps verified, resumed at 13:50, product looks good at 13:55 (Katya Farnsworth). No soft chocolate found in last hour of pallets (Ingrid).

resolved.title: Sollich 4 mixing tank red maintenance alarm
resolved.resolution: Back running at 14:42 — lid sensor issue, needs inspection tomorrow but can continue production (Marcos Jimenez).

resolved.title: Separation Table 1 making noise when running
resolved.summary: Table 1 producing noise during operation, flagged to maintenance at 19:09.

resolved.title: MM3 broken internal piece found during run
resolved.summary: Operator found broken piece inside MM3 at 22:21, no missing fragments, QA and supervision cleared to continue running.
resolved.resolution: QA confirmed piece intact, no product risk, approved to run at 22:30 (Alfonsina Gil, Miriah Manzanares).

resolved.title: Tunnel 2 jam from product accumulation
resolved.summary: Tunnel 2 jammed with product at 22:58, paused to clean, cause under investigation.
resolved.resolution: Cleaned and back running, investigating at 23:11 — likely mound of product after restart (William Beattie).

resolved.title: Metal detector belt came off track
resolved.summary: Belt running off track at 07:54, paused for maintenance.
resolved.resolution: Back running at 08:05 — airflow valve was off, chocolate buildup on roller removed, valve now open (S3 Enrober).

resolved.title: Depositor nozzle clogged on east side
resolved.summary: One nozzle clogged at 15:20, paused to attempt clear.
resolved.resolution: Couldn't clear nozzle, removed piston to prevent caramel from flowing through return belts at 15:24 (William Beattie).

resolved.title: Tunnel 2 plates needed adjustment and cleaning
resolved.summary: Stopped at 01:15 to adjust plates on Tunnel 2 and clean.
resolved.resolution: Adjustments completed, line running at 01:37 (Luis Falcon).

resolved.title: FFS bag sealing problem, line down
resolved.summary: Line down at 10:49, problems with bag sealing.
resolved.resolution: Line running at 10:51, still blow-offs but operator monitoring and improved (Claudio Tovar, Jeffrey Barney).

resolved.title: FFS open gussets with Syntegon support
resolved.summary: Open gussets at startup, running 70 ppm with Syntegon tech providing instruction.
resolved.resolution: Improved by 10:55 — bags turning out better, silver line reduced, packaging acceptable (Claudio Tovar).

resolved.title: FFS blade cleaning for open pouches
resolved.summary: Down at 12:01 to clean blade, getting open pouches.

resolved.title: FFS dirty blades preventing bag cuts at shift start
resolved.summary: Machine not cutting bags at second shift start, dirty blades.

resolved.title: Truffle Cute Cavanna film threading failure overnight
resolved.summary: Cute Cavanna not wrapping correctly from 00:16, maintenance and operators couldn't fix through third shift.
resolved.resolution: Fixed at 07:02 by day shift lead — film installed incorrectly, rollers mislabeled, roll position wrong; trained third shift lead on correct setup (Grey Boscan).

resolved.title: ML1 Cavanna open product spike from jaw settings
resolved.summary: Cavanna product coming out open, filled bin in 10 minutes starting 14:15.
resolved.resolution: Running at 14:50 — jaws cutting into chocolate causing seal to open, Shawn made adjustments (Molding Line 1 Flow-Wrap).

resolved.title: ML4 TG4 frozen HMI, gondola full
resolved.summary: TG4 frozen HMI at shift start, gondola full, line down.

resolved.title: MF Matrix upper load arm issues
resolved.summary: Upper load arm having issues at 09:05, maintenance on line.
resolved.resolution: Fixed at 09:37 — adjusted weight, MVF amp, pouch feed sensor, spring tension; now outputting 44 smooth and consistent (Nathan Ruiz).

needs_attention.title: Chiller not maintaining set temp, affecting cooling tunnels
needs_attention.summary: Chiller cycling 0-5°C instead of holding setpoint, second compressor not auto-starting as designed.
needs_attention.status: William walked Nathan through manual start of second compressor at 15:11; maintenance still investigating why auto-start failed.

needs_attention.title: Tate's cases delayed, blocking Thursday 11:00 start
needs_attention.summary: Item 41152 cases were due yesterday, WestRock now delivering tomorrow 13:00 but production starts 11:00.
needs_attention.status: WestRock confirmed 13:00 delivery tomorrow per Ethan at 13:06; Janell confirmed no V2 cases exist, only V2 pouches. Case count: need 6,000, have 1,665 V1.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 2 enrober maintenance blocking clean prep
needs_attention.summary: Couldn't start enrober clean all first shift; maintenance rebuilding heaters and parts, dark chocolate still in system, milk buffer at 72%.
needs_attention.status: As of 11:45, still unable to drain enrober or empty buffer; maintenance work preventing cleaning.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 2 Tunnel 2 failed visual with pecan and grease
needs_attention.summary: Visual inspection found pecan contamination and excessive grease on Tunnel 2 table.
needs_attention.status: Re-cleaning Tunnel 2; no pass confirmation by window close.

needs_attention.title: MM4 not printing on bags
needs_attention.summary: MM4 bag printer failing at 22:41, maintenance on site.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance still here as of 22:41; no resolution posted.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 2 C1/C2 conveyors faulting repeatedly on tracking sensors
needs_attention.summary: Conveyor belts C1 and C2 stopping on their own, maintenance says reset but happening frequently.
needs_attention.status: Preston explained tracking sensor timeout logic at 13:05, needs adjustment to favor one side; still faulting.

needs_attention.title: Sollich 4 cooling tunnel 1 condensation or leak
needs_attention.summary: Condensation or leak observed on cooling tunnel 1 at 15:15.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance requested at 15:15; no update by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML2 dirty molds causing staining and holes in bars
needs_attention.summary: Bars coming out stained with holes on top surface from dirty molds at 15:08.
needs_attention.status: Pulling and replacing molds; depositor operator thinks all molds need changing as of 15:14.

needs_attention.title: MF Matrix foreign chocolate in supersack
needs_attention.summary: Found SRS dark chocolate in wrong supersack at 09:58, contamination risk.
needs_attention.status: Created OPL, running one supersack at a time with EE inspecting all product; continuing to inspect per Frederick at 10:06.

needs_attention.title: Truffle Cute Cavanna double-packing since 10:08
needs_attention.summary: Lot of double packs started at 10:08, tried adjustments, called maintenance.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance still working at 14:49; chocolates keep coming out doubled as of window close.

needs_attention.title: ML1 C1/C2 conveyors faulting on tracking sensors
needs_attention.summary: Same issue as L1 Sollich 2 — belts stopping on their own, resetting but recurring.
needs_attention.status: Preston confirmed tracking sensor timeout at 13:05; needs adjustment but still faulting.

needs_attention.title: ML1 60g molds mixed into 35g tote, no wash tracking
needs_attention.summary: Visual inspection found 60g molds in 35g tote at 13:02, no tracking or paperwork for mold washing process.
needs_attention.status: Frederick noted lack of mold wash tracking at 13:45; keeping same EEs in washroom daily to prevent this. Full stack of 30 molds wrong size.

needs_attention.title: ML1 glycol contamination on smiling face mold eyes
needs_attention.summary: Glycol found on eyes of smiling face molds at 14:52.
needs_attention.status: Flagged at 14:52; no resolution or corrective action posted.
